description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage containing three jobs: build, compatibility_1_85, and nightly. Use the rust:latest Docker image for the build job, rust:1.85.0 for the compatibility_1_85 job, and rustlang/rust:nightly for the nightly job, each running a before_script that creates $CARGO_HOME (cargohome) and echoes the cache path (the build job also installs cargo-tarpaulin). Cache the target directory and the cargohome folder with distinct keys (build_cache, build_70_cache, build_nightly_cache) and trigger each job only on changes to Cargo.toml, .gitlab-ci.yml, src/**/*, tests/**/*, benches/**/*, or examples/**/* while setting CARGO_HOME=cargohome. In the build job run "rustc --version && cargo --version", then "cargo tarpaulin --all-features --out lcov", and finally upload coverage with "bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash) -Z". In the compatibility_1_85 job run "rustc --version && cargo --version" followed by "cargo test --all-features". In the nightly job allow failure, run "env RUST_BACKTRACE=1 cargo test --all-features", and use the same cache and trigger settings as the other jobs.
